description_cn: 圆滑网格，只对网格内部顶点起作用，对网格边界无效。（强度值的变化好像没有影响，不知道是不是在特定情况下才有效果。）
description_en: A smooth mesh only affects the vertices inside the mesh and has no effect on the mesh boundaries. (Changes in intensity values ​​seem to have no effect; it's unclear whether this effect only applies under specific conditions.)

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
